use_cases: Displaying SaaS product features with animated card interactions
Showcasing business services with image and call-to-action reveal
Creating interactive product cards for service landing pages
ai_summary: An interactive product card component with sophisticated hover animations featuring a shoe product image, gradient overlay reveal, and animated CTA link. The card supports dark mode and includes multiple coordinated transitions including height changes, opacity fades, and translate animations for a polished micro-interaction experience.
